content: رَغم إن اَلظُروف صَعبة جِداً، مُمكِن اَلواحِد يِبقى مَبسوط
translations: eng:though circumstances are very difficult, one can still become happy

transcriptions.arabizi: raghm 'in ilzuroof saAba gidaen, mumkin ilwaehid yib'a mabsoot
